steps.title: Use weighted means
steps.content: For a frequency table, the mean is the weighted sum divided by the total frequency: $$\text{mean}=\frac{\sum(\text{value})(\text{frequency})}{\sum\text{frequency}}.$$ Since all four choices use the same values $70$, $80$, $90$, and $100$, Desmos can compare the four weighted means directly.

steps.title: Compare the four Desmos calculations
steps.content: Enter the four weighted-mean expressions. Choice A gives about $87.27$. Choices B, C, and D each give $85$ because their frequencies are balanced around the midpoint between $80$ and $90$. The greatest mean is therefore choice A.
